column2: Direct public API / page element, no special technique needed.
Needs scraping logic, pagination, or scroll handling but still public data.
Rate-limited, login-gated, or partially hidden — possible but fragile/slow.
Not technically or legally accessible without platform/court cooperation.
Must-have for Sprint 1 — core identifiers, build first.
Important, build once P0 is stable.
Nice-to-have, time-sensitive or low-value-add — build later.
instaloader (Python) — handles session, rate limiting, profile extraction.
Official X API v2 (paid tiers); use for legal compliance and stability.
Graph API (heavily restricted for non-Page data); most profile data needs login + consent.
Add random delays of 2-5 seconds between requests on every platform.
Authorised Law Enforcement use only. Log every extraction with a case ID; comply with India's IT Act and each platform's Terms of Service.
Username/Handle -> Bio/About -> Profile Picture -> Posts -> Hashtags/Mentions -> Tags/Associates.
Profile-picture hash + username + bio keywords + work/education info = strongest signals for same-person matching.

Twitter and X are the same platform (X Corp rebrand, 2023). 'Twitter' tab covers classic tweet mechanics; 'X' tab covers newer features (Premium, Communities, Spaces, Articles). Use both together for one target — they are not two separate accounts.
Default FB privacy hides most fields (friends list, contact info, pages liked) from non-friends. Treat anything not explicitly Public as best-effort only.
